title: O's enderite
description: Adds new ores, tools, mobs, blocks and structures based on Enderite — a powerful resource from the End.
body:
🟣 Enderite Expansion – A Mini End Update!
This mod introduces a new endgame material: Enderite — a powerful resource from the End dimension.

🧱 Features include:

   🪨 New Enderite ores found in the End

   ⚔️ Craftable Enderite tools, weapons, and armor

   👾 End-themed mobs

   🧱 Enderite block

   🏰 New structures

   🎮 Discord https://discord.gg/wV9KYnjtSW
